name: Arcane Surge
description: When you Dash-Jump the next ability you use will have bonus Range, Duration, and Spirit Power. Lasts up to 7s.

name: Compress Cooldown
description: Imbue an ability to reduce its Cooldown.

name: Duration Extender
description: Imbue an ability to increase its Duration.

name: Slowing Hex
description:
Slows movement of enemy target. Also Silences their movement-based items and abilities.
Increases the target's gravity.
Does not affect target's stamina usage.

name: Spirit Sap
description: Target an enemy to reduce their Spirit Resist and Spirit Power.

name: Decay
description:
Inflict damage over time to a target, dealing damage based on their current health.
Decay's damage is non-lethal and does not apply item procs.

name: Disarming Hex
description: Disarms enemy target and reduces their Bullet Resist.

name: Greater Expansion
description: Increases the range and effect radius of your abilities and items.

name: Knockdown
description:
Apply a Stun after 2s. Stun duration is increased against airborne targets.

Increases the target's gravity for the duration of the stun.

name: Radiant Regeneration
description: Heal and gain bonus Movement Speed for a short duration when you cast an ability.

name: Silence Wave
description:
Launch an expanding projectile which Silences enemies for a short duration and deals impact damage.

Silence does not interrupt channeling abilities.

name: Superior Cooldown
description: Reduces the Cooldown of your abilities.

name: Superior Duration
description: Increases the duration of your abilities and items.

name: Surge of Power
description: Imbue an ability with permanent Spirit Power. When that ability is used, gain bonus Move Speed and maintain full speed while attacking.

name: Cursed Relic
description: Curses an enemy - interrupting, Silencing, Disarming, and preventing item usage. Removes all non-ultimate buffs.

name: Ethereal Shift
description:
You enter a void state and become untargetable and invincible for a short duration, during which you float slowly and cannot perform actions. Afterwards you gain Spirit Power, Move Speed, and Spirit Resist.
Can be canceled early.
Activation cancels any active ability.

name: Focus Lens
description: Target an enemy to Silence them. A portion of all damage dealt during the silence gets applied to the target when the silence wears off.

name: Magic Carpet
description:
Summon a Magic Carpet that will fly you away. While flying you are immune to slows and doing any action will dismiss the carpet.
Cannot use abilities while the carpet is being summoned.

name: Refresher
description: Reset the cooldown of all your abilities and restore all your charges.

name: Transcendent Cooldown
description: Reduces the Cooldown of your abilities and items.

name: Golden Goose Egg
description: Gain souls over time, as long as you are alive.

name: Mystic Expansion
description: Imbue an ability to increase its range and effect radius.

name: Rusted Barrel
description: Target an enemy to reduce their Fire Rate and Bullet Resistance.

name: Frostbite Charm
description:
Imbued ability has its Cooldown reduced and gains Spirit Power. When the ability deals damage, freeze the target and apply bonus damage.

Cooldown is per target.

name: Mystic Conduit
description: Provides yourself and allies with a powerful spirit focused aura. Has reduced values on allies.

name: Mystical Piano
description: After a short delay, enemies in the target area will be stunned and have their stamina depleted. After the stun they will be temporarily dazed.

name: Omnicharge Signet
description: Imbue any active non-ultimate ability with Bonus Ability Charges. Already charged abilities receive more bonus charges.

name: Prism Blast
description: You enter a void state and become untargetable and invincible for a short duration, during which lasers blast out and rotate around you.

name: Shrink Ray
description: Reduces Model Size and grants Move Speed to the target. Allows usage of tunnels in this mode. Can be self-cast.

name: Unstable Concoction
description: Consume a concoction that grants you Unstoppable and increased speed, health, spirit and weapon damage. After a short duration you die and explode, stunning nearby enemies and dealing damage based on your maximum health.

name: Debuff Reducer
description: Reduces the duration of all negative effects applied to you.

name: Enduring Speed
description: Reduces the effect of enemy Move Speed penalties.

name: Guardian Ward
description:
Provide the target with a Barrier and temporary Move Speed.
Can be self-cast.
Cooldown is reduced by half when cast on someone else.

name: Healing Booster
description: Increases the effectiveness of your healing.

name: Reactive Barrier
description: Automatically restores one stamina and gain a Barrier when you are movement locked, Stunned, Chained, Immobilized, or Slept.

name: Return Fire
description: Automatically fire a bullet towards any attacker who damages you with their abilities or weapon.

name: Bullet Resilience
description: When below 50% health, gain additional Bullet Resist.

name: Fortitude
description: After not taking damage for a period, gain health regen.

name: Healing Nova
description: Heal yourself and nearby allies.

name: Lifestrike
description:
Your Melee Attack applies Movement Slow and heals you for a percentage of the Melee Damage dealt plus a fixed amount.

This heal is 40% effective vs non-heroes.
Cooldown is 1.5x as long for Light Melee hits.

name: Majestic Leap
description:
Launch yourself high into the air and grant yourself a Barrier. While in the air, you can use the active again to drop down faster.

Cannot be used for 5s if attacked by enemy Hero.

name: Metal Skin
description: Become immune to bullets.

name: Rescue Beam
description: Heals a target allied hero and yourself for a percentage of Max Health. Once while healing, you can Pull the target towards you. Can be self-cast.

name: Spirit Resilience
description: When below 50% health, gain additional Spirit Resist.

name: Trophy Collector
description: Whenever you score an assist or kill, gain extra health, sprint, ability range and passive soul generation. This effect stacks and persists through death.

name: Veil Walker
description: Walking through a cosmic veil grants you Stealth, Heal and increased Move Speed.

name: Warp Stone
description: Teleport straight ahead, gaining Bullet Resist.

name: Colossus
description:
Grow larger in size, gaining bullet resist, spirit resist, and melee damage.

Nearby enemies suffer from slow and have reduced dash speed.

name: Divine Barrier
description:
Remove all non-stun debuffs from the target and provide them with a Barrier and Move Speed.
Can be self-cast. Cooldown is reduced by half when cast on someone else.

name: Diviner's Kevlar
description: Upon casting an ultimate ability gain a Barrier and temporary Spirit Power.

name: Infuser
description: Gain Spirit Lifesteal and Spirit Power.

name: Inhibitor
description: Your bullets build up to reduce the target's outgoing damage and apply healing reduction.

name: Leech
description: Reduces the effect of enemy applied healing reduction.

name: Phantom Strike
description: Teleport to an enemy target and pull them to the ground. Dealing damage, Move speed reduction and Disarm.

name: Unstoppable
description:
Temporarily suppress negative status effects and become immune to Stun, Silence, Sleep, Root, and Disarm.
Cannot be used while Stunned or Slept.

name: Healing Rite
description: Grant Regen and Sprint Speed to the target. Gets dispelled if you take damage from enemy players or objectives. Can be self-cast.

name: Melee Lifesteal
description:
Your next Melee attack heals you.

This heal is 30% effective vs non-heroes.
Cooldown is 1.5x as long for Light Melee hits.

name: Rebuttal
description: On a successful Parry against an enemy Hero, Heal yourself for the damage parried and returns that damage to the target, and temporarily gain increased damage.

name: Celestial Blessing
description: Applies an extremely powerful cleanse that replenishes your allies globally.

name: Cloak of Opportunity
description: Block the next debuff that would apply movement lock, Stun, Chained, Immobilize, or Sleep and become Unstoppable. Also gain a Barrier and bonus move speed

name: Electric Slippers
description:
When sliding, evade bullets, gain fire rate and deal damage to enemies around you.

Cooldown is per target.

name: Eternal Gift
description: Periodically gain a random permanent stat buff.

name: Nullification Burst
description: Removes any positive buffs and prevents stamina usage and healing effects on enemies.

name: Seraphim Wings
description: When Airborne, You deal more damage and take reduced damage. Allows unlimited Air Dash and Jumping.

name: Shadow Strike
description: Go Invisible on Stamina use with no detection range. Doing a melee attack while invisible will cause you to steal bullet and spirit resistance from them and deal damage over time.

name: Active Reload
description: While reloading, pressing Reload during the highlighted portion will instantly finish your reload and grant you Fire Rate, Bullet Lifesteal and Move Speed.

name: Intensifying Magazine
description: Increases Weapon Damage as you continuously fire your weapon.

name: Kinetic Dash
description: When you Dash-Jump you gain Fire Rate and bonus Ammo until your next reload. Lasts up to 7s.

name: Long Range
description: Deal additional Weapon Damage when beyond a minimum distance from your target.

name: Melee Charge
description: Your next Heavy Melee attack against an enemy deals increased damage.

name: Opening Rounds
description: Your attacks have additional Weapon Damage against enemies above 50% health.

name: Slowing Bullets
description: Your bullets build up a Movement Slow on enemies.

name: Spirit Shredder Bullets
description: Your bullets apply a debuff that reduces the Spirit Resist of the target and grants you and your allies Spirit Lifesteal against them.

name: Split Shot
description:
Make your weapon fire multishot.

Hitting more than one Hero per attack will grant a stacking weapon damage bonus.

Targets can only be hit once per multishot.

name: Weakening Headshot
description: Landing a Headshot on Heroes reduces their Bullet Resist.

name: Ballistic Enchantment
description: Imbue an ability with increased range. Dealing damage with that ability grants you increased weapon damage per unique hero hit. Has reduced effect on non-heroes.

name: Berserker
description: Your Weapon Damage increases as you take sustained damage.

name: Burst Fire
description: Briefly gain Fire Rate and Move Speed when one of your bullets hits an enemy hero.

name: Cultist Sacrifice
description: Target an enemy NPC and consume it for 170% Bonus Souls and grants a powerful long lasting buff.

name: Escalating Resilience
description: Grants Bullet Resist when your bullets hit an enemy hero. Each shot can only grant one stack.

name: Express Shot
description: Your next attack will fire twice in quick succession with increased damage and velocity. This attack consumes extra ammo.

name: Heroic Aura
description: Provides Bullet Resist to nearby friendly units.

name: Hollow Point
description: When you are above 65% health, deal additional Weapon Damage and your bullets reduce enemy Bullet Resist.

name: Hunter's Aura
description: Reduces nearby enemies' Bullet Resist and Fire Rate. If there is only one enemy hero nearby, this effect is doubled.

name: Point Blank
description: When in close range to your target, gain Weapon Damage and your bullets apply a Movement Slow.

name: Sharpshooter
description: Deal additional Weapon Damage when beyond a minimum distance from your target.

name: Tesla Bullets
description: Your bullets have a chance to shock your target. The shock will jump to a nearby enemy.

name: Toxic Bullets
description: Your bullets build up a Bleed on enemies, causing them to lose a percentage of their Max Health over time. Also applies Healing Reduction on the bleeding target.

name: Weighted Shots
description: Your bullets build up a Movement Slow on enemies.

name: Armor Piercing Rounds
description: Your Bullets have a chance to become unavoidable, piercing through enemies and ignoring their Bullet Resistance.

name: Crippling Headshot
description: Landing a Headshot on Heroes will reduce their Bullet and Spirit Resist and applies Healing Reduction.

name: Crushing Fists
description:
Your melee damage will restore ammo and apply a stacking bullet resist debuff on enemies. Heavy melee applies 2 stacks.

If the target reaches max stacks, they will be stunned.

name: Glass Cannon
description: Each hero kill grants permanent Fire Rate (up to a max of 8 times). Death results in the loss of 1 stack.

name: Lucky Shot
description:
Your bullets have a chance to be empowered, causing them to deal bonus weapon damage on hit.
Bonus damage cannot Crit.

name: Ricochet
description: Your bullets will ricochet on enemies near your target, applying any bullet procs and dealing a percentage of the original damage.

name: Shadow Weave
description: Become Stealthed. Whenever you take damage while Stealthed you get briefly revealed.

name: Silencer
description: Your bullets build up to a Silence. Victims are immune to the build up for 10s after silence expires.

name: Spellslinger
description:
While in-combat whenever you cast an ability or item, gain a stacking buff that improves fire rate and reload speed.
Each stack refreshes the duration.

name: Spiritual Overflow
description: Gain bonus Fire Rate, Spirit Power and Ability Duration by charging up when shooting enemy heroes.

name: Close Quarters
description: Deal additional Weapon Damage when in close range to your target.

name: Restorative Shot
description: Your next bullet will heal you based on what target you hit.

name: Infinite Rounds
description: You have infinite ammo.

name: Runed Gauntlets
description: Everytime you land a heavy melee, your existing cooldowns get reduced.
